caption: A person's hands are seen removing a trading card from a clear plastic protective sleeve. The action takes place in an indoor setting with a table containing several stacked boxes in the background. The person holds the card, which is encased in a hard plastic top loader, and gradually pulls it out of the flexible outer sleeve. Throughout the sequence, two small inset video windows are visible on the right side of the screen. One window displays a person in a black t-shirt, while the other shows a wider shot of a room. On-screen branding includes the text "PYS BREAKS" in large orange and white letters and a smaller logo that reads "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person's hands shift positions to slide the card completely free from its packaging.
